title: Otherside  (Remake)
description: The Otherside is a corrupted dimension datapack that expands the Deep Dark’s lore with deadly biomes, powerful artifacts, and unique mechanics. Face escalating danger the longer you stay, uncover legendary loot, and survive a world consumed by Sculk.
body:
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f328e7f0fe3f79f53972603d078408079c8eb4ca.jpeg)The Otherside
Remake by SimonNetzack (Original by Moxvallix & Wulfian)

Original Code & Datapack Design: Moxvallix

Original Lore, Textures & Loot Tables: Wulfian

Remake, Bug Fixes & Improvements: SimonNetzack
permission has been obtained from the owner while this datapack was being edited
The Otherside makes use of the wonderful TagLib datapack by HeDeAn.
Originally created for the third Datapack Jam, under the theme "Corrupted", this version is a faithful remake of the original concept with numerous bug fixes, performance adjustments, and minor balancing improvements, made by SimonNetzack, while keeping the soul of the original untouched.

At the outer fringes of our universe there has been a force – a great force, but terrible – skulking at the edges and slowly devouring it, changing it, corrupting it.

Worlds have fallen, civilizations consumed, twisted… all feeding the endless madness, the endless hunger.

It waits, skulks, and hungers in the dark.

– Wulfian the Wise

What is The Otherside?
The Otherside is a corrupted dimension, overwhelmed by Sculk, full of rich lore and danger. It expands on the mythology of Ancient Cities and the Deep Dark.

You’ll find legendary artifacts, new mechanics, and deadly biomes. But be warned – the longer you stay, the more corrupted you become.

How to Enter
The Otherside is end-game content. You’re expected to have full diamond gear or better before attempting entry.

To enter:

Defeat a Warden to obtain a Warden’s Key.

Use the key at an Ancient City.

The portal will activate – good luck.

Survival Tips
Time is your enemy – the dimension becomes more hostile the longer you stay.

Water is toxic. Avoid it.

Exit portals are rare, but they exist.

Items & Features
Use this command to preview items in a test area:
/place template sculk:demo

You’ll discover many legendary items in loot chests or as mob drops. A few highlights:

Bundles

Enhanced capacity compared to vanilla.

Crouch + Right Click: Fill

Right Click: Withdraw

Ignore unstackables and stack-16 items

Use from offhand and scroll to pick items

Inven-tree Roller

Offhand + crouch + scroll = Navigate inventory rows.

Item Magnet

Attracts items while crouching. Limited use, mends with XP.

Totems

Provide passive effects when held.

Many more legendary items await – no spoilers.
